testcase.name: manufacturer_Review_Return_and_Edit

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Returned toaster message mismatch for: Manufacturer returned successfully expected [Supplier returned successfully] but found [Manufacturer returned successfully], Updated toaster messege mismatch for: Manufacturer updated successfully expected [Supplier updated successfully] but found [Manufacturer updated successfully]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Returned toaster message mismatch for: Manufacturer returned successfully expected [Supplier returned successfully] but found failure.message: The following asserts failed: Returned toaster message mismatch for: Manufacturer returned successfully expected [Supplier returned successfully] but found [Manufacturer returned successfully], Updated toaster messege mismatch for: Manufacturer updated successfully expected [Supplier updated successfully] but found [Manufacturer updated successfully], Review toaster message mismatch for: Manufacturer reviewed successfully expected [Supplier reviewed successfully] but found [Manufacturer reviewed successfully]

testcase.name: Creation_Of_Manufacturer

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Created Toaster message mismatch for: Creation failed with message: Manufacturer created successfully expected [Supplier created successfully] but found [Manufacturer created successfully]
